design_philosophy: A Gamified smooth low poly game theme acting as a portfolio for an experienced creative director/technologist. Balances an immersive 3D scroll-driven sequence with clean, high-end typography and UX.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter uppercase font-black
scale.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight uppercase font-bold
scale.label: text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold

spacing_and_layout.mobile_strategy: Stack sections vertically. Keep the scroll trail as a straight vertical line connecting milestones on the left edge of the screen. Throttle frame scrubbing performance.

hero.layout: h-screen w-full relative flex flex-col justify-center items-start z-10
hero.greeting: text-white 'Hi! I\'m ' with 'Yuval Cohen' in text-[#FACC15]
hero.animated_typography: Slot-machine vertical flip using framer-motion AnimatePresence. Roles: CREATIVE TECHNOLOGIST, CREATIVE DIRECTOR, PRODUCER, AI & 3D SPECIALIST, MTB RIDER.
hero.ctas: Two buttons. Primary: Download CV (Solid Yellow, Black Text). Secondary: Let's Talk (Outline White, Hover Yellow).
hero.scroll_indicator: Center-bottom MTB cleat shoe + bicycle pedal SVG with continuous rotation and 'Let\'s Ride!' text. White glowing color.

journey_panel.position: fixed right-8 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-50 hidden lg:flex flex-col gap-4
journey_panel.design: Floating wireframe mountain map with a yellow SVG track (`path`) that fills using framer-motion `useScroll`. Includes 4 colored flags mapping to the checkpoints.

canvas_sequence.behavior: Sticky `h-screen` background behind all content. 241 frames scrubbed based on `scrollYProgress`. Overlaid with a subtle vignette/gradient (`bg-black/40` or gradient) to ensure text legibility.

capability_badges.design: Glowing borders matching the checkpoint colors. Active state gets a `box-shadow` glow.

selected_works.layout: Asymmetric Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A). 1 hero project (`col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2`), secondary projects (`col-span-4`), narrow projects.
selected_works.interaction: Hover triggers image scale-up (`scale-105`) and staggered tag reveals.

tools_marquee.design: Monochrome or glowing tool logos slowly sliding infinitely. Use `react-fast-marquee`.

contact_modal.trigger: Let's Talk button or Campfire trailhead CTA.
contact_modal.design: Shadcn Dialog. Dark surface `#131C26`, yellow thin borders, sharp corners. Professional and popup-blocker safe.

motion_guidelines.scroll: MUST use `lenis` for smooth momentum scrolling to make the frame-scrubbing feel premium and heavy.
motion_guidelines.reveal: All text and sections use `whileInView` with a slow, damped spring (`type: 'spring', damping: 20, stiffness: 100`).
motion_guidelines.hover: Buttons have a slight lift (`-translate-y-1`) and border color transition.

projects.description: Project Grid Image - Creative Laptop Setup
Project Grid Image - Creative Portfolio Showcase

background_fallback.description: Fallback cinematic mountain biking night image in case 241 frames are not available.
